about:
I come from a supportive and highly educated family where values like perseverance and dedication were deeply instilled in me. Despite an initial struggle transitioning from a pre-engineering background to a Bachelor's in Computer Science, I embraced self-learning, mastered programming languages like C, C++, Java, Python, JavaScript, and MSSQL, and developed strong foundations in data structures, algorithms, and AI. Alongside academics, I served as General Secretary of my university's Arts and Dramatics Society, honing my leadership and organizational skills.


Currently, I work as a Full Stack Developer at SysReforms International, where I’ve contributed to impactful projects such as the World Organisation for Animal Health (WOAH) Pathway Information System (PVS) and Standard Online Navigation Tools (SONT). These experiences have enriched my technical expertise in Node.js, React.js, Material UI, Sequelize, and Express, while strengthening my problem-solving, teamwork, and deadline management skills. I’m driven to continue exploring advanced technological challenges and delivering quality solutions.
